2024 law effective Jan 2025; DMV & Police Chiefs Association manage; AAA branches distribute envelopes.
DMV partnership with Univ. of Vermont Autism Collaborative; modeled after CT/MA.
Partnership with Down Syndrome Advocacy Project; widely distributed via state police.
ADOT & DPS collaboration; envelopes at all MVD locations; law enforcement training included.
DMV launched program statewide after HB2501; Loudoun County piloted earlier.
State Police DMV Univ. of Delaware collaboration; launched Aug 2025.
Act 16 signed Feb 2025; program starts Jan 1 2026; unanimous bipartisan passage.
